nodes.name: mysql_cdc.sql
nodes.summary: SQL script for the Iceberg CDC e2e test that creates a MySQL CDC source, a RisingWave products table, and a CDC-sourced materialized view for streaming MySQL changes into Iceberg.

nodes.name: products
nodes.summary: Products table definition used in the MySQL CDC Iceberg e2e test, containing id, name, and description columns for CDC change capture.

nodes.name: mysql_cdc_insert.sql
nodes.summary: SQL script that inserts test data rows into the MySQL products table to seed the CDC Iceberg e2e test.

nodes.name: no_partition_cdc.toml
nodes.summary: Iceberg e2e test case configuration for CDC-based upsert sink to a non-partitioned Iceberg table, specifying MySQL source setup and verification queries.
